hero.description: Forge cinematic brand sites from a single link. Forgely turns any product URL into a fully-stocked store with motion, voice, and commerce — designed by AI, hosted on us, ready to sell in 5 minutes.
hero.trustedBy: Trusted by 2,000+ brands on the waitlist

socialProof.caption: Brands forging on Forgely · waitlist preview

valueProps.description: A brand site is more than pretty pictures. Forgely co-designs the look, the sound, the structure and the storefront — then keeps shipping with you.

cinematic.title: Cinematic, end-to-end
cinematic.body: Hero, value props, brand story and product moments share one visual DNA — the way Aesop, Recess and Terminal feel, generated for you in minutes.

store.title: A real store, not a landing page
store.body: Medusa v2 commerce is wired in from day one: products, cart, checkout, orders, inventory and Stripe. Code export when you outgrow us.

copilot.title: AI Copilot that ships, not chats
copilot.body: A tool-using agent lives in your dashboard. Ask it to rewrite copy, swap a hero video, ship a discount, or redesign a section — it does the work.

howItWorks.title: From a single link to a full brand.
howItWorks.description: Five quiet steps, zero rituals. You stay the creative director. Forgely takes care of the production crew.

01.title: Drop a link or describe a brand
01.body: Paste any Shopify, WooCommerce, Etsy or Amazon URL — or just type the idea. Forgely scrapes products, screenshots, copy, prices and intent.

02.title: Forgely directs the film
02.body: A multi-agent crew (Analyzer, Director, Planner, Copywriter, Artist) picks a Visual DNA and Product Moment, then writes the shot list.

03.title: Cinematic assets are forged
03.body: Hero loop, 3 micro-videos, brand story, product showcase and logos generate in parallel via Kling, Flux and Ideogram with auto-fallback.

04.title: Compliance + SEO + storefront
04.body: FTC / GDPR / FDA rules sweep, structured data, llms.txt and a Medusa storefront are wired up automatically.

05.title: Live in 5 minutes
05.body: Your site ships to Cloudflare with SSL on .forgely.app or a custom domain. Tweak with the visual editor or just talk to the AI Copilot.

showcase.title: 10 visual DNAs · 10 product moments.
showcase.description: One hundred fully-coherent looks, before you even touch the editor. Real client builds will replace these previews when private beta opens.
showcase.footnote: Previews are stylized placeholders · real cinematic videos arrive with the Terminal upgrade (T27).

pricing.title: Pay for the forge, not the seat.
pricing.description: Start free. Subscribe for monthly credits + features. Top up anytime — purchased credits never expire.

faq.title: Common questions, answered straight.
faq.description: Anything missing? Email hello@forgely.com — we'll send you a real reply, not a chatbot.

what.question: What does Forgely actually generate?
what.answer: A complete, hostable brand site: a 6-section homepage with cinematic Hero loop, value props, brand story, product showcase, social proof and CTA — wired into a real Medusa v2 storefront with cart, checkout, orders and Stripe.

skills.question: Do I need design or code skills?
skills.answer: No. Forgely picks a Visual DNA, drafts copy, generates assets, and ships the site. You can still tweak everything later via a visual editor or by chatting with the in-product AI Copilot.

import.question: Can I import my existing Shopify or WooCommerce store?
import.answer: Yes. Paste a URL and Forgely scrapes products, collections, copy and screenshots. We standardise everything into a single schema and let you choose what to keep, replace or improve.

credits.question: How does the credit system work?
credits.answer: Every plan ships with monthly AI credits. Generations, edits, video re-rolls and Copilot actions consume credits — a full homepage costs around 900 credits. Top-ups never expire; subscription credits reset monthly.

unique.question: Will my site be unique or templated?
unique.answer: 10 Visual DNAs × 10 Product Moments = 100 base looks, then your brand voice, products and palette layer on top. Two brands using Forgely will not feel the same — that is the whole point.

export.question: Can I export the code if I outgrow Forgely?
export.answer: Yes. Pro plans include monthly code exports of the generated Next.js site. Agency and Enterprise get unlimited exports. Your data, your store, your call.

finalCta.description: Drop a store URL or your idea. Forgely will hand you back a cinematic, stockable, sellable brand site — usually in less than 5 minutes.

footer.tagline: Made for brands that ship. Built in dark mode by default.

waitlist.onTheListBody: We're inviting brands in waves. Watch your inbox — your seat to forge a cinematic store is on its way.
waitlist.help: No credit card. Free during private beta. We'll never sell your email.

errors.generic: Could not add you to the waitlist. Try again?
errors.network: Network hiccup. Please retry in a moment.
errors.storeUrlInvalid: Store URL must start with http(s)://

toasts.created: You're on the list. We'll email you when forging opens.
toasts.existing: You're already on the list. We'll be in touch soon.
